creator: bf1783@googlemail.com
text:
As you can see from the logs at:

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/ports/math/dieharder/

, I updated math/dieharder to 3.31.0, the latest available version, on
15 March 2011. (And there were no releases between 3.29.4beta and
3.31.0, even though Prof. Brown announced the completion of 3.29.5beta
on his webpage.)  You seem to be using an outdated ports tree.

Regards,
                 b.
